_help_Name: Descriptive name of the tire model
Name: Magic Formula Tire from ADAMS/Car TIR file
_help_Mass: Mass of the tire in kg
_help_Inertia: Rotational moments of inertia of the tire: [Ixx, Iyy, Izz] in kg.m^2
_help_TIRSpecificationFile: Path to the Adams/Car .tir specification file containing Pacejka Magic Formula coefficients
_help_CoefficientOfFriction: Reference ground coefficient of friction scale factor
_help_Visualization: Mesh files for left and right tire rendering and tire visual width
